content:
***Call for Translators' Avatar Frame translations!***

Dear volunteers,

We are working on an **Exclusive Avatar Frame** for volunteer translators who helped us translate the game!
Our writers have completed writing the item name & description for this avatar frame. We would love to invite you to translate its item name and description into your own languages. We think it's a meaningful and fun way to make this special award truly yours.

If you're interested, you're welcome to edit the google sheet below and add the translations **before the end of September**. (If you don't make it, it's fine, we'll use placeholder MTL first and we can still update the translation later.)
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1FnrXlcxsRXxQM2Sn3I25lkt9DRiDs2aJxYPLCNVlz20/edit?gid=0#gid=0

@everyone
